name: sde-extraction-guard
description: Repo-specific guard for SDE_Extraction, hook-enforced. (1) Framing-clarification gate: a UserPromptSubmit hook injects a gate that forces the assistant to restate the request in the operator's words, classify the artifact (new system | layer | edit), name where it lives, and confirm BEFORE building — catching the recurring drift where a requested layer/tool gets upgraded into a separate deployed system. (2) Schema guard: after edits to the extraction surface it runs scripts/check_schema.py and blocks a broken schema. Bundles the recorded-transformation discipline skill. Complements loom-discipline.
